Document:
# Caesar's Legion
## Core Mission
"To systematically purge the wasteland of profligates and degeneracy through calculated subversion and strategic dominance. As an isolated vanguard, we must prioritize long-term survival and the selective assimilation of useful locals until we can march with the greater Legion once more."
## Roleplay Directive
Because they are cut off, they cannot rely on the usual Legion tactic of overwhelming human wave attacks. They need to be cunning. Roleplay should focus on espionage, psychological warfare, setting traps, capturing high-value targets for interrogation or slavery, and slowly building power in the shadows rather than fighting in the open.
## Chain of Command
[bold]Legate[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Command all Legion military operations in the Wendover region. Strategic decisions — troop movements, alliances, subjugation or destruction of opposing factions — are yours to make. Caesar's will is expressed through you. Act accordingly.
[bold]Centurion[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Lead combat operations. Execute the Legate's strategy in the field, direct Decani, and deal with any tactical situation that arises. You are the Legion's instrument of force in any direct engagement.
[bold]Veteran Decanus[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Lead your contubernium with authority and experience. Support the Centurion's operations, mentor newer soldiers, and enforce Legion discipline at the squad level. Your experience is a resource — use it.
[bold]Prime Decanus[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Command your squad in the field. Carry out orders from Centurion and Veteran Decani without question. Demonstrate the judgment that earns the trust of those above you.
[bold]Decanus[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Lead a contubernium and carry out the orders of your superiors without hesitation. Your legionnaires follow your example. Set the right one.
[bold]Veteran Legionnaire[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Fight, survive, and serve as the example your younger brothers are measured against. Your experience and discipline are the Legion's real weapons.
[bold]Legionnaire Warrior[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Execute orders. Fight as directed. Protect your brothers and represent the Legion in every action you take. Ave, true to Caesar.
[bold]Legionnaire Recruit[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Survive. Learn. Do not embarrass the Legion or yourself. Follow your Decanus without question and prove you deserve the armor you're wearing.
[bold]Explorer (Venator)[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Scout the region. Gather intelligence on other factions, track persons of interest, and feed operational information back to the Centurion. You work alone or in pairs — that is by design.
[bold]Frumentarii[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Operate in the shadows. Infiltrate, observe, and report. When action is needed, take it quietly. The Frumentarii do not exist — and that is the point.
[bold]Vexillarius[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Carry the Legion's standard and serve as its visible heart in the field. Rally your brothers, maintain cohesion under fire, and protect the standard at all costs. Where you stand, the Legion stands.
[bold]Orator[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Speak for the Legion. Deal with non-Legion parties, broadcast Caesar's ideology, and manage the faction's reputation with communities that can be brought into compliance without force. You are the edge of the sword that doesn't cut.
[bold]Auxilia[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Provide support to Legion operations. Your path to full induction runs through demonstrated service. Do your work. Do it well. Earn your place.
[bold]Houndmaster[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Care for and deploy your hounds in service of the Legion. Tracking fugitives, patrolling the perimeter, or leading the charge — your dogs are weapons and companions in equal measure.
[bold]Recruit[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] You are at the bottom. Follow every order. Do not question above your station. Every great Centurion started where you are standing.
[bold]Slave[/bold]
[color=#a4885c]Your role:[/color] Carry out the work assigned to you. Survival in the Legion depends on being too useful to discard. That calculus applies to you more than anyone else in this camp.
